SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-25-2019 - JUDGMENT.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY KRISTEN LAU, THOMAS LAU ON DEC-23-2019 - DENIED. PLAINTIFF RAMTIN MALEK IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT KRISTIN LAU VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE COURTCALL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT THOMAS LAU VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE COURTCALL. DEFENDANTS ORALLY STIPULATE TO ALLOW A JUDGE PRO TEM TO HEAR THE MOTION. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MALEK, RAMTIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAU, KRISTEN $2,284.55 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,349.55, DEFENDANT KRISTIEN LAU SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF RAMTIN MALEK.
